content.speakerText: Hi, I'm calling to book a slot for my graduation checklist meeting.
content.speakerTextCn: 你好，我想预约一个毕业清单面谈的时间。
expectedAnswers: Sure, how about Wednesday at 3 PM?
Could we do Thursday instead? I have a class at that time.
I'm flexible next week—any day works for me.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确回应了预约请求并提供可选时间
语言准确性：语法正确，使用恰当的预约表达（book a slot, how about, any day works）
表达自然度：符合英语口语习惯，无中式表达
关键词覆盖：使用了 graduation checklist meeting, time, next week 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: You'll need to bring your transcript and thesis outline.
content.speakerTextCn: 你得带上成绩单和论文提纲。
expectedAnswers: Got it—I'll print them out tonight.
Wait, do you mean the proposal or the final draft?
Thanks, I'll check the student portal to confirm what's required.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否正确回应材料要求并尝试澄清或确认
语言准确性：使用正确动词搭配（bring, print out, check the portal）
表达自然度：使用口语化表达如 'Got it', 'Wait...' 符合真实对话
关键词覆盖：使用了 transcript, thesis outline, proposal, final draft, portal 等核心词汇

content.speakerText: I'm preparing for my graduation review. When would be a good time to meet?
content.speakerTextCn: 我正在准备毕业审核，什么时候方便面谈？
expectedAnswers: How about Monday at 10 AM? I have an opening then.
I'm available Tuesday or Thursday afternoons—let me know what suits you.
You can book a slot through the online system; I have availability next week.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否提供明确时间选项或引导对方自助预约
语言准确性：使用恰当的预约句型（how about, I'm available, book a slot）
表达自然度：语气礼貌，符合学术顾问身份，无生硬翻译
关键词覆盖：使用了 graduation review, meet, availability, slot, next week 等场景关键词
